repository_conventions.summary: Use getByRole, getByLabel, or getByTestId. Avoid CSS class selectors.
CSS class selectors like .profile-display-name are used throughout profile tests

uncertainties: [low-confidence] CSS class selector .profile-display-name used instead of getByRole/getByTestId (tests/profile.spec.ts:5) — suppressed: selector convention is conflicted between CONTRIBUTING.md and existing code patterns
